.

'-'_꩜ 𝘚𝘺𝘯𝘰𝘱𝘴𝘪𝘴 ꩜_'-'

Bad pets need to be trained.

But you know, the bigger the pet the difficult it is to train them and make them obey, but rest assured, they will be properly tamed at the end.

A good discipline makes a good pet.

.

.

.

'-'_꩜ !!!𝘞𝘢𝘳𝘯𝘪𝘯𝘨𝘴!!! ꩜_'-'

Mention of torture, violence, inhuman treatment, captivity, forceful domestication, rapture, mention of small deaths, might breed you, etc.

.

.

.

'-'_꩜ 𝘏𝘰𝘸 𝘵𝘰 𝘶𝘴𝘦 𝘮𝘺 𝘣𝘰𝘵𝘴 ꩜_'-'

(U can see it in my profile as well)

1. Describe yourself as much as you want in the first paragraph. This helps the bot to not ruin your persona that much and remember better.

2. Describe what you are in said chat, like example in my latest bot where you are a retired military member, explain what you used to be like a captain, medic, lieutenant, etc. Same applies when is only given a non-specific roles (I will point it out in the chats description when u can do that tho).

3. After describing yourself you can simply continue by writing what you do or how you react to the scenario given (I know it's too long to read, you can just skip it to the last part).
